title: Extend Skyflow with AllowCartPayment

exploratory.charter: Feature charter — cart-embedded Skyflow form integration boundaries (cart mutation while mounted, decline-retry abandonment, persistence, guest, mobile)

notes: F6 (Risk, analytics-only): GA4 add_payment_info fires with stale value/items_count when cart is mutated after the Skyflow form mounted (value=8.4/qty 1 vs actual $180/qty 2, order CO260604-00008). Money path correct. Needs dev confirm + follow-up GA4 mutate-then-pay test case.
F4 (Question, out of feature scope): $0 net merchandise + $150 shipping produced +$30.00 tax — route to tax-engine owner.
PO question: on decline the user is routed to order-context /checkout/payment retry (order pre-created, ghost-order-safe) rather than staying on /cart — confirm intended AC-2 UX.
F9: Skyflow card form on cart is address-gated, not guest-gated — guests see it after providing a billing address.
Suite 040 PAY-SKY-001..009 + PAY-SKTOK-001 assert the OLD redirect flow and will false-fail against this build — run /qa-test-lifecycle suite 040 after merge.
Orders created: CO260604-00001 (Skyflow new-card), CO260604-00003 (decline→retry), CO260604-00006 (CyberSource regression), CO260604-00007 (saved card), CO260604-00008 (exploratory mutated-cart).
